title: The Safest Place in the World
original_title: O Lugar Mais Seguro do Mundo
overview: The film is a portrait of Marlon, after being the victim of a great socio-environmental tragedy: his city was buried by the collapse of a dam. “The safest place in the world” is how he refers to his original place, today surrounded by cameras and security.
